comment: "The aspects I found the most interesting was learning how to doff PPE, airborne precautions, and contact precautions. I gained a lot of knowledge, which will help me in the medical field."
"This course has really helped me a lot. I will apply all the techniques at my workplace."
"Informative and helpful in strengthening my understanding of infection control and PPE use. Clear explanations with practical relevance to clinical settings."
"The emphasis on PPE reuse and safety during shortages was particularly valuable given current global health challenges."

"I found the practical demonstrations of PPE donning and doffing and the clear explanations of infection transmission routes most interesting. The combination of visuals and step-by-step instructions helped me understand procedures clearly."
"The information of the course is up to date and well structured. Moreover, I really liked that there were ample pictures, videos, and illustrations shown in the course."
